---

## Deliverable Summary

### Issue #1367 — Canon alignment: require full functional delivery for product build PASS

This PR implements Phase 2 governance hardening following the MMM/OC-009 delivery failure
(calibration example: APGI-cmy/maturion-isms#1553) where a generic IAA PASS was issued for
a PR delivering only a UI shell with no wired user workflows.

### Changes Delivered

| File | Change | Impact |
|------|--------|--------|
| `governance/canon/FULLY_FUNCTIONAL_DELIVERY_STANDARD.md` | v1.0.0 → v2.0.0: added §12 Delivery Verdict Taxonomy | Defines FULL_FUNCTIONAL_DELIVERY, PARTIAL_FUNCTIONAL_DELIVERY, UI_SHELL_ONLY, ADMIN_PASS, FUNCTIONAL_PASS; governing principle; split verdict model; prohibited failure modes; calibration example; downstream ripple targets |
| `governance/canon/INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md` | v1.8.0 → v1.9.0: added §Product-Facing PR Split Verdict Model | IAA must emit ADMIN_PASS/FUNCTIONAL_PASS/VERDICT split verdict for product-facing T2 PRs; updated Binary Output Specification |
| `governance/canon/GOVERNANCE_CANON_MANIFEST.md` | Added FFDS and IAA canon to manifest (manifest reconciliation — both files existed in CANON_INVENTORY but were absent from manifest) | Count reconciliation: 95→97 canon, 110→112 combined |
| `governance/CANON_INVENTORY.json` | Regenerated SHA256 hashes for both amended canon files | Hash integrity maintained |
| `.admin/pr.json` | Updated for PR #1368 / issue #1367 with correct scope | Preflight gate compliance |

### Manifest Reconciliation Note

`FULLY_FUNCTIONAL_DELIVERY_STANDARD.md` and `INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md` were
present in `CANON_INVENTORY.json` at versions 1.0.0 and 1.8.0 respectively before this PR,
but were absent from `GOVERNANCE_CANON_MANIFEST.md`. This PR adds them to the manifest and
version-bumps them as part of the same wave. The total count increase (95→97 canon files) is
a manifest reconciliation, not double-counting.

### Cross-Reference Corrections Applied

- FFDS §12.5 calibration example: "§9.1 and §9.4" corrected to "§12.1 and §12.4" (correct section numbers after renumbering)
- FFDS §12.3 verdict table: "§9.2" corrected to "§12.2" (previous session fix)
- FFDS §13 revision history: "§9" corrected to "§12" (previous session fix)
